mapper.select: SELECT * FROM space WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM space WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM space WHERE space_type_id = #{spaceTypeId} and is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM space WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM space WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO space (name, location, capacity, facilities, description, status, create_time, update_time,is_deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{facilities}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},0)

INSERT INTO space (name, location, capacity, facilities, description, status, create_time, update_time,is_deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{facilities}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.delete: UPDATE space SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
